text:

From-To: open->feedback

lang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I /usr/local/include' 
1048 	clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I ./src/rt' 
1049 	clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I ./src/rt/isaac' 
1050 	clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I ./src/rt/uthash' 
1051 	clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I ./src/rt/arch/x86_64' 
1052 	clang++: warning: argument unused during compilation: '-I ./src/libuv/include' 
1053 	In file included from ./src/rt/rust_task.cpp:1: 
1054 	./src/rt/rust_task.cpp:503:68: error: comparison of unsigned expression >= 0 is always true  
[-Werror,-Wtautological-compare] 
1055 	do { rust_task_thread* _d_ = this->thread; if (log_rt_task >= log_err && _d_->log_lvl >= log_err) { _d_->log(this,  
log_err, "task %" "l""x" " ran out of stack", this); } } while (0); 
1056 	~~~~~~~~~~~ ^ ~~~~~~~ 
1057 	./src/rt/rust_task.cpp:503:95: error: comparison of unsigned expression >= 0 is always true  
[-Werror,-Wtautological-compare] 
1058 	do { rust_task_thread* _d_ = this->thread; if (log_rt_task >= log_err && _d_->log_lvl >= log_err) { _d_->log(this,  
log_err, "task %" "l""x" " ran out of stack", this); } } while (0); 
1059 	~~~~~~~~~~~~ ^ ~~~~~~~ 
1060 	2 errors generated. 
1061 	gmake: *** [rt/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/rust_task.o] Error 1 
1062 	*** Error code 1 
1063 	 
1064 	Stop in /a/ports/lang/rust. 
1065 	================================================================ 
1066 	build of /usr/ports/lang/rust ended at Thu Apr 5 12:45:15 UTC 2012
